author: Dennis
msg:
I’d like to share my recent findings.

Yesterday, I reduced the number of ULOs to one per unique IP. As a result, all phones recovered. Previously, each device earned around 0.07 or less, but now some are reaching up to 0.507. This suggests that there is likely no general calibration issue.

I will monitor the rewards again tomorrow to see if they remain consistent for these same licenses. After that, I plan to gradually increase the number of ULOs per IP and share further results.

At the moment, the situation seems similar to what we experienced over a month ago, when the maximum number of devices per IP was effectively limited to 20. However, the team is not stating that rewards will return to previous levels if you stay within that limit, only that you will earn something. At least I cant remember a statement, where they said "once calibration is over your reward level that you have previous will return". Hope this info helps someone.
